# AGENTS.md — homebrew-vpn-bypass

## Project Overview

Homebrew tap for VPN-Bypass. Selective VPN bypass for specific domains and IPs.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/homebrew-vpn-bypass](https://github.com/GeiserX/homebrew-vpn-bypass)
- **Language:** Ruby
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Architecture

Standard Homebrew tap with formula definitions in `Formula/`.

### Key Files

- `Formula/vpn-bypass.rb` — Homebrew formula

## Usage

```bash
brew tap GeiserX/homebrew-vpn-bypass
brew install vpn-bypass
```
